videoSnippet.title: Starting From Scratch! || Javokhir Sindarov vs Praggnanandhaa || Super Chess Classic Romania 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Sindarov, Javokhir (2776) - Praggnanandhaa R (2733)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Chess Classic Romania 2026 (Chess.com) [02] 2026.05.14
C54 Giuoco Piano

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Bc5 4.c3 Nf6 5.d4 exd4 6.cxd4 Bb4+ 7.Nbd2 Nxe4 8.d5 Nxd2 9.Bxd2 Bxd2+ 10.Qxd2 Ne7 11.O-O-O d6 12.h4 O-O 13.h5 h6 14.Rdg1 Bg4 15.Nh4 Qd7 16.Bd3 Rfe8 17.Bc2 Qb5 18.f3 Bxh5 19.g4 Bg6 20.Nf5 Qc5 21.Kb1 Nxd5 22.Nxh6+ gxh6 23.Bxg6 fxg6 24.Rc1 Qb5 25.Qxh6 Qd3+ 26.Ka1 Qd4 27.Qh7+ Kf8 28.Qxg6 Re2 29.Qf5+ Ke8 30.Qg6+ Kf8 31.Qf5+ Ke8 32.Qg6+ Kd8 33.Qg8+ Re8 34.Qg5+ Ne7 35.Rce1 Qd3 36.Re3 Qg6 37.Qb5 Rb8 38.Rhe1 a6 39.Qa4 b5 40.Qa5 Qf7 41.Rc1 Nd5 42.Rd3 Rb6

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:20 Game Starts!
01:35 CNG (0-0-0)
